post.description: Create a new product or update an existing one
Set the pricing for a product
Set the transfer price for a product
Get the transfer price for a product

@type.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message. This string must contain at least
one "/" character. The last segment of the URL's path must represent
the fully qualified name of the type (as in
`path/google.protobuf.Duration`). The name should be in a canonical form
(e.g., leading "." is not accepted).

In practice, teams usually precompile into the binary all types that they
expect it to use in the context of Any. However, for URLs which use the
scheme `http`, `https`, or no scheme, one can optionally set up a type
server that maps type URLs to message definitions as follows:

* If no scheme is provided, `https` is assumed.
* An HTTP GET on the URL must yield a [google.protobuf.Type][]
  value in binary format, or produce an error.
* Applications are allowed to cache lookup results based on the
  URL, or have them precompiled into a binary to avoid any
  lookup. Therefore, binary compatibility needs to be preserved
  on changes to types. (Use versioned type names to manage
  breaking changes.)

Note: this functionality is not currently available in the official
protobuf release, and it is not used for type URLs beginning with
type.googleapis.com. As of May 2023, there are no widely used type server
implementations and no plans to implement one.

Schemes other than `http`, `https` (or the empty scheme) might be
used with implementation specific semantics.

rpcStatus.description:
The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for
different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is
used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains
three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details.

You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the
[API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

items.description: Array of transfer price lookup items. Max 1000 items per request.
Array of items for which transfer price info was asked. Max 1000 items per response (matches request cap).

status.description: Status indicating whether the operation executed successfully or encountered an error.

transfer_price_usd.description: Transfer price of the partner SKU in USD currency.

msrp_usd.description: MSRP in USD currency of the partner SKU.

is_active.description: The pricing status of the item (Active or Inactive).

items.description: Array of prices needed to be set.

destination_country_code.description: Alpha-2 ISO country code representing the destination country, where the price should be set or updated.

price_usd.description: Price to be set in USD currency for that item.

discount_percentage.description: Discount precentage to applied on price for that item.

is_active.description: The pricing status of the item (Active or Inactive).

items.description: Array of (partner_sku, destination_country_code) pairs of the requested price set or update.

destination_country_code.description: Alpha-2 ISO country code representing the destination country, where the price is set or updated.

status.description: Status indicating whether the workflow executed successfully or encountered an error.

items.description: Array of items needed to be created or updated.

dimensions_cm.description: Dimensions (length, width, height) of that item in centimeters.

vm_weight_cm.description: Volumetric weight of that item in centimeters.

actual_weight_kg.description: Actual weight of that item in kilograms.

hs_code.description: Harmonized system (HS) code for that item.

items.description: Array of items created or updated in the request.

status.description: Status indicating whether the update executed successfully or encountered an error.

items.description: Array of transfer prices needed to be set or updated.

transfer_price_usd.description: Transfer price to be set or updated in USD currency for that item.

msrp_usd.description: MSRP needed to be set or updated for that item.

is_active.description: The pricing status of the item (Active or Inactive).

items.description: Array of items for which pricing will be set.

status.description: Status indicating whether the update executed successfully or encountered an error.

length.description: Length of the item in centimeters.

width.description: Width of the item in centimeters.

height.description: Height of the item in centimeters.
